raw_title: Book Review: ‘Country of Lords,’ by Kim Phillips-Fein
description: In a new book, the historian Kim Phillips-Fein chronicles a “shadow tradition” of anti-egalitarians who fought against America’s founding ideals.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Dad, Love, Me: A Memoir,’ by Matthew Quick
book_title: ‘Dad, Love, Me: A Memoir,’ by Matthew Quick
description: Matthew Quick’s memoir takes the form of a letter to his father as dementia slowly dismantles the man who once terrified him.
